scripts.__postinstall: node -e "const path = require('path'); const fs = require('fs'); const filePath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'node_modules/ts-loader/dist/index.js'); let fileStr = fs.readFileSync(filePath, { encoding: 'utf8' }); fileStr = fileStr.replace(/, rootDir: undefined/, ''); fs.writeFileSync(filePath, fileStr, { encoding: 'utf8' });"
scripts._NOT_NEEDED_postinstall: npm run pinCompromisedColorPackage && npm run electron-build
scripts._NOT_NEEDED_pinCompromisedColorPackage: (npm ls colors || echo "NPM LS?") && rimraf node_modules/electron-rebuild/node_modules/colors && rimraf node_modules/dir-compare/node_modules/colors
scripts._NOT_NEEDED_pinCompromisedColorPackage_: find node_modules -maxdepth 100 -type d -name "colors" && npm ls colors
scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production webpack --config webpack.config.js && ncp src/package.json dist/package.json && cd dist && rimraf node_modules && npm i --ignore-scripts --foreground-scripts && rimraf package-lock.json && cd ..
scripts.build:prod: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.start: npm run build:prod && cross-env DEBUG=r2:*,readium-desktop:*,proxy-agent electron .
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ts && npm run lint:css
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:ts:fix && npm run lint:css:fix
scripts._NOT_NEEDED_start:dev:renderer:library-r: npm run start:dev:renderer:pdf && concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:dev:renderer:library" "npm run start:dev:renderer:reader"
scripts.start:dev:main: npm run build:dev:main && npm run start:dev:main:electron
scripts.start:dev: cross-env DEBUG_COLORS=true npm run start:dev:renderer:pdf && cross-env DEBUG_COLORS=true npm run start:dev:renderer:preload && cross-env DEBUG_COLORS=true concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:dev:renderer:library" "npm run start:dev:renderer:reader" "npm run start:dev:main"
scripts.start:dev:quick: cross-env SKIP_CHECK_TYPESCRIPT=1 DEBUG_COLORS=true npm run start:dev:renderer:pdf && cross-env SKIP_CHECK_TYPESCRIPT=1 DEBUG_COLORS=true npm run start:dev:renderer:preload && cross-env SKIP_CHECK_TYPESCRIPT=1 DEBUG_COLORS=true concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:dev:renderer:library" "npm run start:dev:renderer:reader" "npm run start:dev:main"
scripts.vscode:launch:attach: npm run vscode:launch:hot && cross-env SKIP_CHECK_TYPESCRIPT=1 DEBUG_COLORS=true concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:dev:renderer:library" "npm run start:dev:renderer:reader" "npm run vscode:launch:attach:electron"
scripts.vscode:launch:hot: cross-env DEBUG=r2:*,readium-desktop:*,proxy-agent NODE_ENV=development VSCODE_LAUNCH=true npm run build:dev:main && cross-env SKIP_CHECK_TYPESCRIPT=1 DEBUG_COLORS=true npm run start:dev:renderer:pdf && cross-env SKIP_CHECK_TYPESCRIPT=1 DEBUG_COLORS=true npm run start:dev:renderer:preload
scripts.postpackage:win: (npm exec --no --offline @electron/fuses read --app ./release/win-unpacked/thorium.exe || npm exec --no --offline @electron/fuses read --app ./release/win-arm64-unpacked/thorium.exe) || echo ok
scripts.postpackage:linux: (ls -alsR ./release/linux-arm64-unpacked/ || ls -alsR ./release/linux-unpacked/) && (npm exec --no --offline @electron/fuses read --app ./release/linux-arm64-unpacked/thorium || npm exec --no --offline @electron/fuses read --app ./release/linux-unpacked/thorium) || echo ok
scripts.postpackage:mac: (ls -alsR ./release/mac-arm64/ || ls -alsR ./release/mac/) && (npm exec --no --offline @electron/fuses read --app ./release/mac/Thorium.app || npm exec --no --offline @electron/fuses read --app ./release/mac-arm64/Thorium.app) && (file ./release/mac-arm64/Thorium.app/Contents/MacOS/Thorium && file ./release/mac/Thorium.app/Contents/MacOS/Thorium) || echo ok
scripts.i18n-scan_: node ./scripts/translate-scan.js "src/resources/locales/temp.json" && sync-i18n --files 'src/resources/locales/*.json' --primary temp --languages ar bg ca cs da de el en es et eu fi fr gl hr it ja ka ko lt nl pl pt-br pt-pt ru sl sv ta tr zh-cn zh-tw --space "    " --finalnewline --newkeysempty && rimraf "src/resources/locales/temp.json"
scripts.i18n-check_: sync-i18n --files 'src/resources/locales/*.json' --primary en --languages ar bg ca cs da de el es et eu fi fr gl hr it ja ka ko lt nl pl pt-br pt-pt ru sl sv ta tr zh-cn zh-tw --space "    " --finalnewline --newkeysempty
scripts.i18n-scan: node ./scripts/translate-scan.js "src/resources/locales/und.json" && i18next-locales-sync --compatibilityJSON v4 --localesFolder ./src/resources/locales/ --primaryLanguage und --secondaryLanguages en --spaces 4 --useEmptyString true && rimraf "src/resources/locales/und.json"
scripts.i18n-check: i18next-locales-sync --compatibilityJSON v4  --localesFolder ./src/resources/locales/ --primaryLanguage en --secondaryLanguages ar bg ca cs da de el es et eu fi fr gl hr it ja ka ko lt nl pl pt-br pt-pt ru sl sv ta tr zh-cn zh-tw --spaces 4 --useEmptyString true
scripts.i18n-typed: node ./scripts/locale-wrap.js "src/resources/locales/en.json" "en.json" && typed_i18n -i "en.json" -o src/typings -l typescript && node ./scripts/translator-key-type.js "src/typings/en.translation.d.ts" "src/typings/en.translation-keys.d.ts" && rimraf "en.json"
scripts.build-bundle-stats: cross-env ENABLE_WEBPACK_BUNDLE_STATS=1 npm run build && npm run bundle-stats
scripts.bundle-stats: npm run bundle-stats_renderer-library && npm run bundle-stats_renderer-reader && npm run bundle-stats_renderer-pdf && npm run bundle-stats_renderer-pdf-extract && npm run bundle-stats_renderer-preload && npm run bundle-stats_main
scripts.bundle-stats_renderer-library: webpack-bundle-analyzer dist/stats_renderer-library.json dist --report dist/stats_renderer-library.html --mode static --default-sizes stat --log-level debug --no-open
scripts.bundle-stats_renderer-reader: webpack-bundle-analyzer dist/stats_renderer-reader.json dist --report dist/stats_renderer-reader.html --mode static --default-sizes stat --log-level debug --no-open
scripts.bundle-stats_renderer-pdf: webpack-bundle-analyzer dist/stats_renderer-pdf.json dist --report dist/stats_renderer-pdf.html --mode static --default-sizes stat --log-level debug --no-open
scripts.bundle-stats_renderer-pdf-extract: webpack-bundle-analyzer dist/stats_renderer-pdf-extract.json dist --report dist/stats_renderer-pdf-extract.html --mode static --default-sizes stat --log-level debug --no-open
scripts.bundle-stats_renderer-preload: webpack-bundle-analyzer dist/stats_renderer-preload.json dist --report dist/stats_renderer-preload.html --mode static --default-sizes stat --log-level debug --no-open
scripts.bundle-stats_main: webpack-bundle-analyzer dist/stats_main.json dist --report dist/stats_main.html --mode static --default-sizes stat --log-level debug --no-open
scripts.patch-types__: node -e 'const path = require("path"); const fs = require("fs"); const filePath = path.join(process.cwd(), "node_modules/marked/package.json"); let fileStr = fs.readFileSync(filePath, { encoding: "utf8" }); fileStr = fileStr.replace(/"exports":/, `"exports__":`); fs.writeFileSync(filePath, fileStr, { encoding: "utf8" });' && node -e 'const path = require("path"); const fs = require("fs"); const filePath = path.join(process.cwd(), "node_modules/marked-emoji/package.json"); let fileStr = fs.readFileSync(filePath, { encoding: "utf8" }); fileStr = fileStr.replace(/"exports":/g, `"exports__":`); fs.writeFileSync(filePath, fileStr, { encoding: "utf8" });'
scripts.unpatch-types__: node -e 'const path = require("path"); const fs = require("fs"); const filePath = path.join(process.cwd(), "node_modules/marked/package.json"); let fileStr = fs.readFileSync(filePath, { encoding: "utf8" }); fileStr = fileStr.replace(/"exports__":/, `"exports":`); fs.writeFileSync(filePath, fileStr, { encoding: "utf8" });' && node -e 'const path = require("path"); const fs = require("fs"); const filePath = path.join(process.cwd(), "node_modules/marked-emoji/package.json"); let fileStr = fs.readFileSync(filePath, { encoding: "utf8" }); fileStr = fileStr.replace(/"exports__":/g, `"exports":`); fs.writeFileSync(filePath, fileStr, { encoding: "utf8" });'
scripts.typescript-check-GO: npm run patch-types && tsgo --showConfig --project ./tsconfig-cli.json && echo "####################" && tsgo --project ./tsconfig-cli.json --listFiles --extendedDiagnostics --diagnostics && npm run unpatch-types
scripts.typescript-check-GO:watch: npm run patch-types && concurrently "tsgo --project ./tsconfig-cli.json --watch --excludeDirectories **/node_modules" "npm run unpatch-types"
